# Clause Bank Naming Convention

Use these stable IDs when referring to fallback language.

| Area | Preferred clause IDs | Fallback clause IDs |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Limitation of liability | LOL-001 standard 12-month cap; LOL-002 SOW-specific cap | LOL-FB-001 increased cap; LOL-FB-002 security-specific cap |
| IP | IP-001 assignment after payment; IP-002 Background IP license | IP-FB-001 assignment on creation with payment suspension |
| GenAI | AI-001 responsible GenAI use; AI-002 no training on client CI | AI-FB-001 prior notice; AI-FB-002 tool disclosure |
| Confidentiality | CONF-001 mutual confidentiality; CONF-002 trade secrets indefinite | CONF-FB-001 5-year survival |
| Payment | PAY-001 14-day payment; PAY-002 gross-up | PAY-FB-001 30-day payment with finance approval |
| Security | SEC-001 information-security baseline | SEC-FB-001 limited audit rights |
| BAA | HIPAA-001 purpose limitation; HIPAA-002 breach notice; HIPAA-003 liability cap | HIPAA-FB-001 revised breach notice; HIPAA-FB-002 audit evidence fallback |
